title: Goya or The Hard Way to Enlightenment
original_title: Goya – oder Der arge Weg der Erkenntnis
overview: As a painter in the court of King Carlos IV, Goya has attained wealth and reputation. He believes in King and Church, yet he is also a Spaniard who dearly loves his people. This contradiction presents him with a dilemma.

trailers.title: Goya - oder Der arge Weg der Erkenntnis (1971)
